title: iris barnumiae var. mariae
intro: Iris barnumiae var. mariae, also known as the 'Maria's Iris', is a rare and endangered variety of the Iris barnumiae plant, a type of flowering plant in the iris family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral compounds that can help to soothe and heal wounds, reduce inflammation, and combat infections. The health benefits of Iris barnumiae var. mariae include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce swelling, and alleviate pain, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health conditions. The herbal preparations of Iris barnumiae var. mariae can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to apply its medicinal properties directly to the affected area.
